descriptions: Architect and scale the frontend and backend infrastructure for a comprehensive healthcare platform using Nuxt.js, Supabase, and PostgreSQL.
Design robust database schemas and optimize serverless workflows to ensure secure, real-time synchronization of patient and clinical data.
Manage end-to-end cloud deployment and hosting configurations on platforms like Vercel and Render, leveraging automated CI/CD workflows to ensure high platform availability.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver responsive and scalable frontend applications, improving user experience and application maintainability.
Translated high-fidelity Figma designs into responsive, pixel-perfect UI components using modern CSS frameworks.
Contributed as a Full-Stack Developer in a 5-member engineering team.
Rebuilt the TCMP website and admin dashboard using Vue.js, Node.js, Express.js, Knex, Supabase, and PostgreSQL to improve features, scalability and user experience.
Implemented and optimized key platform features, contributing to improved performance and smoother user interactions.
Developed responsive user interfaces and robust server-side logic for web applications using Vue.js and Node.js.
Used HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frontend frameworks to build top-quality code for diverse projects
